revision.comment: 「[[Template:Resize]]」の保護レベルを変更しました: [[Wikipedia:保護の方針#半永久的な保護]]「[[Wikipedia:影響が特に大きいテンプレート|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]」に基づき無期限拡張半保護 ([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
disabling TfD banner, since even the tiny version will break stuff
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text: {{Tfm/dated|page=Resize|otherpage=Midsize|link=Wikipedia:Templates for discussion/Log/2024 July 25#Template:Resize|type=disabled|help=off|bigbox={{#invoke:Noinclude|noinclude|text=yes}}}}{{safesubst<noinclude />:#if:{{{2|}}} |<{{safesubst<noinclude />:#ifeq:{{{div|}}}|yes|div|span}} style="font-size:{{{1|}}};">{{{2|}}}</{{safesubst<noinclude />:#ifeq:{{{div|}}}|yes|div|span}}> |<{{safesubst<noinclude />:#ifeq:{{{div|}}}|yes|div|span}} style="font-size:90%;">{{{1}}}</{{safesubst<noinclude />:#ifeq:{{{div|}}}|yes|div|span}}> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis in Wikidata, not here! --> </noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
